title: D2 error category spec
description: Schema for contracts/error-category/error-category.spec.json — the source-of-truth catalog of the closed ErrorCategory classification. Each category corresponds to one snake_case wire string carried on the result envelope (gRPC + JSON) so consumers can do generic class-based handling (e.g. retry any infrastructure_unavailable) without importing the producer's error-code catalog. The PascalCase enum member is derived from the wire string (validation_failure -> ValidationFailure). This catalog is the single source for the nine category wire strings — the same closed set the canonical error-codes schema enumerates for each error code's 'category' field. DcsvIo.D2.ErrorCodes.Category.SourceGen reads it to emit the ErrorCategory enum + ErrorCategoryWire mapping + ErrorCategoryJsonConverter into DcsvIo.D2.ErrorCodes.Category; the TypeScript codegen pipeline reads it to emit error-category.g.ts into @dcsv-io/d2-error-category.

wire.description: Snake_case wire-format category string carried on the result envelope. Must be unique across the spec. The PascalCase enum member / TS union value is derived from this string. The closed set MUST match the 'category' enum in contracts/error-codes/error-codes.canonical.schema.json byte-for-byte.

doc.description: XML <summary> / JSDoc text rendered on the emitted enum member (.NET) and union member comment (TS).

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.
